doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_zero_p: zero predicate. Returns true iff x is ±0 (sign-agnostic), false otherwise. Note: signed zero is observable in arithmetic (RNDD breaks +0+(-0)), but zero_p collapses both signs to a single true — they share the 'zero' kind. Class 'arithmetic' (50ms budget).
divergence_from_c: C returns int; TS returns boolean. Never throws.
refs: src/core.ts L77–L90 — Sign type, signed-zero doc.
